card.placeholderAction: Open the card editor to get started.

popup.noHourlyData: No hourly data available for this day.
popup.integrationNoHourlyData: The selected forecast entities do not provide hourly forecast data.

labels.title: Title (optional)
labels.remaining_today_entity: LEFT / remaining today (optional, overrides auto-derived value)
labels.show_hourly_as_main: Show Hourly Forecast as Main Card

helpers.device: Recommended: selecting a device will auto-configure the card
helpers.estimate10: Display Estimate10 is only applicable when the integration type is Solcast
helpers.integrationType: Automatically set when a forecast device is selected above. Override here only when configuring forecast entities manually without a device.
helpers.liveData: +1HR and LEFT are auto-detected or auto-derived where possible. Set these manually to override, or to use a custom sensor.
helpers.actualArrays: Optional: configure individual array sensors to display a stacked breakdown on today's bar. Each label is a single character shown inside its segment (e.g. N, S, E).
helpers.desktopTextScale: Desktop Text Scale: only applies on wider screens (≥ 768 px). Mobile sizing is unchanged.
helpers.hourlyAsMain: Displays the hourly forecast view directly on the card instead of the daily forecast bars.
helpers.fontSize: Optional daily bar text size in pixels. Leave blank to use CSS/default styling.
helpers.barWidth: Optional forecast bar width in pixels. Leave blank to use CSS/default styling.

warnings.manualEntities: Changing device will not overwrite manually configured entities.

customCard.name: Solar Forecast Card
customCard.description: Daily solar energy forecast with hourly breakdown support.
